entries.title: Resident Evil (2002)
entries.recommendedReason: The definitive starting point — the remake that set the standard for survival horror.
entries.summary: S.T.A.R.S. Alpha Team investigates a mansion in the Arklay Mountains and uncovers Umbrella Corporation's biological weapon experiments.

entries.title: Resident Evil 0
entries.recommendedReason: Prequel best appreciated after the original — context enriches Rebecca's backstory without spoiling RE1's mystery.
entries.summary: S.T.A.R.S. Bravo Team member Rebecca Chambers and convicted ex-Marine Billy Coen investigate a derailed train and an abandoned training facility in the Arklay Mountains.

entries.title: Resident Evil 2 (2019)
entries.recommendedReason: Picks up months after RE1 — introduces Leon and Claire, the franchise's other pillar protagonists.
entries.summary: Rookie cop Leon Kennedy and college student Claire Redfield fight to survive a zombie outbreak in Raccoon City.

entries.title: Resident Evil 3 (2020)
entries.recommendedReason: Runs parallel to RE2 — Jill's escape from Raccoon City before and during the outbreak.
entries.summary: Jill Valentine fights to escape Raccoon City while being relentlessly pursued by the bioweapon Nemesis.

entries.title: Resident Evil 4 (2023)
entries.recommendedReason: Six years after Raccoon City — Leon's mission to rural Spain shifts the series toward action-horror.
entries.summary: Now a federal agent, Leon Kennedy is sent to a rural Spanish village to rescue the president's kidnapped daughter.

entries.title: Resident Evil: The Marhawa Desire
entries.recommendedReason: Manga prequel to RE6 — optional but enriches Piers Nivans' character arc.
entries.summary: BSAA agent Piers Nivans and Professor Doug Wright investigate a bio-terror outbreak at a remote boarding school in Asia.

entries.title: Resident Evil: Degeneration
entries.recommendedReason: CG film bridging RE4 and RE5 — Leon and Claire reunite during an airport bioterror incident.
entries.summary: Leon and Claire respond to a zombie outbreak at a US airport, uncovering a conspiracy tied to a pharmaceutical company.
